svg.text: Multi-Agent Collaborative Code Review & Synthesis System

text.tspan: Five specialized AI agents collaborate autonomously to write, review, test, and document
code — all streamed live to a polished dark-themed dashboard.

svg.text: After Security and Architect review, CodeGen refines the code based on their feedback
Multi-Agent Collaborative Code Review & Synthesis System · Kaggle AI Agents Capstone 2026
Built with Next.js · Gemini · Groq · MCP · SSE Streaming · Miro Design System
